title: andryala incana
intro: Andryala incana, also known as Woolly Hare's Ear or Incana Andryala, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Andryala incana include its potential to reduce inflammation, aid in digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Andryala incana typically involve infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications.
